titleStmt.title: SII 35.113: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 113. (A.R. No. 56 of 1951-52.) MAḌAKI HONNAḶḶI, KALGHATGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the compound of the Kalamēśvara temple.
This badly damaged record, referring to the rule of Śivachitta-Permāḍi, is dated in Śaka 101[8] Dhātu. The details of the date cannot be verified.

It records a gift of land, house, oil-mill etc., for the deity Grāmēśvara, made over into the hands of Rudraśakti-paṇḍita by Ādityayya, a subordinate of the king who was governing Koṁkaṇa-900 and Halasigi-12000 from his capital Chaṁdrapura. Records another gift of the deity Ugurēśvara by the Ugura-300 and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraccuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
śvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ samasta
prasūta pri
nmahāpracaṁḍamā¨rttaṇḍamā¨rttaṁḍakarātībratējapratāpavaśīkṛtasakaḷamaṁḍaḷanuttuṁgasiṁhalāṁ
naramahādhvaja pe¨rmmāṭṭito¨ryyani¨rgghōṣaṇaṁ caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭitāṣṭadaśāśvamēdhadīkṣā dīkṣita
ḷa prasūtaṁ himavadgirīṁdraruṁdraśikharasthāpita mahāśaktiprabhāvaṁ tyāgaja
ga jhaṁpaḷācā¨ryya niśśaṁkarāmaṁ śubhaṭakanaka śaraṇāgatavajraprākāraṁ lōkayya kaḷpa
drumaṁ saṁkrāntidhavaḷaṁ mū¨rtinārāyaṇaṁ kī¨rttimā¨rttaṇḍaṁ maṇḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭa vairigharaṭṭa subhaṭarāja
śikhāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇītyakhiḷanāmāvaḷī ḷakṛtarappa śrīmanmahāmahēśvaraṁ śrīśivacitta
vīrape¨rmāḍidēvaṁ koṁkaṇavoṁbaynūṟumaṁ halasigepanni¨rcchāsiramaṁ samastadēśamaṁ ḷutta nijarājadhāni
caṁdrāpuradoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire Ari baḷā va ba
sakhaṁ suridapaneṁ peṇne nuta bhūpanēnō danujaṁ . Āraveyiṁ suradruma
sādadiṁda kaṁbara taṭākamaṁ pa¨rśadiṁ māḍi ¨rttira ni¨rmitaṁ vittu suradenuva
mahōdāraguṇaṁ cikadi dva . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . Anudinavattu
na kī¨rtti ki śā caḍi duṣṭadēśa dū
manōmudadiṁdenetti
manōma
harisuta baḷpa¨rgga māṟaṁpava¨rgnara viṁdāsyeya
sau¨ryya dā riyina viśvō¨rvviyādaradiṁba
kalpa rā ḷa dityana paṭṭada satiyenipa cauṁciya
svasti samasta prasastisahitaṁ
śrīmadaṣṭādaśa paṭṭaṇa śrīmanmahāprabhu piriyapadēva
ḷaṁ biṭṭeya nāyakaru yādiśyayaṁgaḷu sakava¨rṣada 101
8 neya dhātusaṁvatsarada daṁdu seṭṭiya khiḍina
na prasādakkaṁ māgrā
mēśvara varamaganappa ruddra
śaktipaṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ ka¨rcci sīmāsaṁmeṁdameṁteṁdaḍe hiriya
ra keṟeya bāgina gāva ga digeṟeyēri bēgūra ḷārisī
meyeraḍu keṟeyaniga myana kallu mēre beṇnibīga Ā
keḷage kaṭe muṭṭa hakkalu mattaṁ grāmēśvara dēvara maneyiṁ mūḍalippaydu kai ma
neya sīme dēvariṁ baḍagaṇa bhāgadalu naṁdādivigege biṭṭa gāṇagoṭṭa haṁnneraḍu kaidēvarege taṁ
buliga sāsi¨rvvareynūṟanālvareleya bōjaṁgaruṁ hēṟiṁgeraḍu visavaṁ biṭṭaru © . mattaṁ U
guru mūnno¨rvvaruṁ grāmēśvaradēva¨rgge daśavaṁda biṭṭaru svadattaṁ paradattā vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā jāyatē krimiḥ . mattaṁ jēṣṭādēvi Upaliṁga gauriyiṁtu samasta nōṁpiyaṁ grāmēśvaradēvarali
svasti śrīmatuguḍiseṭṭiya bīḍinakeṟeyataḍiya Ugurēśvaradēva¨rgge Eppatēḷokkalu sahita Uguramunnū¨rvvaru biṁ
ṇiseṭṭiguṁ parasiṁgaṇa gōnabaṁmaṇa siṁdarabīcaṇa Ecaṇa Iṁtivaru Eṇṇegāṇa 1 caitradali hāga pavitradalu hāga
hoṟaṇibaṁdu koyvaḍaydu haṇavaṁ Ugurēśvadēva¨rgge biṭṭaru
Digital edition of SII 35.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
